title: Windows build environment bootstrap
description: Create a PowerShell setup script and documentation for installing the Windows and optional WSL/Linux build dependencies used by the Bazel/Bzlmod project. Also fix the Windows libsodium genrule so it does not accidentally invoke the WSL bash.exe stub.
acceptance_criteria: A PowerShell script exists for installing or checking Bazelisk, Git Bash, Visual C++ Build Tools, and optional WSL Linux dependencies.
The script writes local Bazel environment configuration that prefers Git Bash over the WSL bash.exe stub on Windows.
Documentation explains requirements, setup, and build/test commands.
The Bazel build no longer fails on the libsodium version_header genrule because Windows uses cmd.exe for that copy step.
Project version and changelog are updated.

tasks.title: Fix Windows libsodium genrule shell
tasks.description: Update third_party/libsodium.BUILD so the version_header genrule uses cmd_bat on Windows and cmd_bash elsewhere.
acceptance_criteria: Windows actions do not need bash.exe for the version_header genrule.
tasks.implementation_notes: Use genrule cmd_bat and cmd_bash attributes in C:/dev/TheWatcher/third_party/libsodium.BUILD.

tasks.title: Add setup-build-env PowerShell script
tasks.description: Create scripts/setup-build-env.ps1 to install/check winget-managed tools, configure .bazelrc.user, optionally install WSL Ubuntu and Linux packages, and verify the environment.
acceptance_criteria: Script supports dry-run style verification through -WhatIf.
Script can skip WSL for Windows-only build setup.
Script writes .bazelrc.user with BAZEL_SH and PATH action_env entries.

unit: Parse the PowerShell script with the PowerShell AST parser.
integration: Run the script with -WhatIf -SkipWsl -NoVerify to validate the non-installing path.

tasks.implementation_notes: Place the script at C:/dev/TheWatcher/scripts/setup-build-env.ps1. Use winget package ids Git.Git, Bazel.Bazelisk, and Microsoft.VisualStudio.2022.BuildTools.

tasks.title: Document build environment
tasks.description: Add build environment documentation and update existing Bazel notes, 00-plan.md, README, MODULE version, and CHANGELOG.
acceptance_criteria: Documentation covers requirements, setup command, Windows build command, and optional WSL/Linux build command.
Changelog records the new version and setup changes.

integration: Run bazel test //... --verbose_failures after documentation and version updates.

tasks.implementation_notes: Add C:/dev/TheWatcher/docs/build-environment.md and update C:/dev/TheWatcher/docs/bazel-build.md, C:/dev/TheWatcher/README.md, C:/dev/TheWatcher/CHANGELOG.md, C:/dev/TheWatcher/00-plan.md, and C:/dev/TheWatcher/MODULE.bazel.

edges.label: script should document and configure the shell behavior fixed in Bazel
